reason: Frontend pre-development checklist and source-of-truth index for this UI refactor.
Keep route, feature, shared component, and ui primitive layout consistent during shadcn migration.
Guide component boundaries, client/server split, accessibility, and reusable UI composition.
Preserve hook/data-fetching boundaries while refactoring UI surfaces.
Preserve Zustand and persisted language/theme preference behavior.
Keep API contracts and TypeScript surfaces stable during refactor.
Apply frontend accessibility, lint, typecheck, and build expectations.
Search before changing shared primitives, tokens, or config values.
Preserve frontend/backend data contracts for upload, storage, and admin flows.
Official shadcn/ui setup, theming, component, dashboard, and migration notes for this task.
